commit.message: fix: No more need for LANG condition

fix: Add `translate auto` command as default, allows to revert from hardcoded language

1. When `LANG=en_US.UTF-8` and `am translate <iso_code>` is being ran,
   it still showed in English. This fixes that bug.
2. When you run `am translate <iso_code>`, it hardcodes the language
   without any way to revert to automatic language choice behavior.
   This also fixes it.
